---
title: "Gata2_affy_pre_process"
author: "Melanie Smith"
date: "2026-04-21"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Clean-up environment

```{r}
rm(list = ls(all.names = TRUE)) # will clear all objects includuing hidden objects
gc() # free up memory and report the memory usage
options(max.print = .Machine$integer.max,
        scipen = 999,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
        dplyr.summarise.inform = FALSE) # Print everything without truncation, avoid scientific notation, keep strings as characters, silence dplyr’s “grouped output” informational me>
set.seed(42) # set seed for reproducibility
```

# Set project directories and file paths

```{r}
project_name <- "20260421_natashaHarvey_gata2_mouse"
base_repo_dir <- "/home/melanie-smith/workDir/natashaHarvey"

project_repo_dir <- file.path(base_repo_dir, project_name)

raw_data_dir <- file.path(project_repo_dir, "data", "raw")
processed_data_dir <- file.path(project_repo_dir, "data", "processed")
dir.create(processed_data, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
out_dir <- file.path(project_repo_dir, "outDir")
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)


```

# Load Libraries

```{r}
if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE))
install.packages("BiocManager")

required_pkgs <- c("oligo", "pd.mogene.1.0.st.v1", "limma")

for (pkg in required_pkgs) {
if (!requireNamespace(pkg, quietly = TRUE)) {
BiocManager::install(pkg, ask = FALSE, update = FALSE)
}
library(pkg, character.only = TRUE)
}
```

# Locate CEL files

```{r}
# cel_dir <- file.path("data", "raw")
cel_files <- list.celfiles(raw_data_dir, full.names = TRUE)

# Ensure reproducible ordering
cel_files <- sort(cel_files)

if (length(cel_files) == 0) {
stop("No CEL files found.")
}

cat("Found", length(cel_files), "CEL files\n")
```

# Read CEL files 

```{r}
raw_data <- read.celfiles(cel_files)

```

# Quality control (basic)

```{r}
sample_names <- sampleNames(raw_data)
print(sample_names)
```

# RMA normalization

```{r}
# background correction, normalisation, calculate expression
norm_data <- rma(raw_data)
```

# Extract expression matrix

```{r}
# get expression estimates
expr_matrix <- exprs(norm_data)
```

# Save outputs

```{r}
write.csv(expr_matrix,
          file = file.path(processed_data, "expression_matrix_rma.csv"),
          quote = FALSE)
saveRDS(expr_matrix, file = file.path(processed_data, "expression_matrix_rma.rds"))

saveRDS(norm_data,
        file = file.path(processed_data, "norm_data_rma.rds"))
```

# Save sample metadata

```{r}
pheno <- pData(norm_data)
write.csv(pheno,
          file = file.path(processed_data, "sample_metadata.csv"),
          quote = FALSE)
```

# Session info for reproducibility

```{r}
writeLines(capture.output(sessionInfo()),
           file.path(out_dir, "sessionInfo.txt"))

cat("Processing complete.\n")
```
